description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a dark, hipped roof and a light-colored exterior, set on a rectangular plot with a driveway and a winding walkway. The front facade features large rectangular windows and a covered entryway supported by columns, leading to a prominent main door. The house has a mix of stone and stucco finishes, with a garage integrated into the right side of the structure. The rear of the house includes a covered patio area, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light. The landscaping is minimal, with a grassy lawn surrounding the house and paved paths connecting the driveway to the entry and around the property. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with functional outdoor spaces and a focus on geometric lines.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark hipped roof, light stone and stucco exterior, large windows, and a covered entryway with columns. The property features a driveway, garage, and minimal landscaping with paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, large windows, driveway, and walkway leading to the door.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back wall with minimal windows and the continuation of the walkway around the house.
description_view_2: View of the house from the opposite side, showing the garage, covered patio, and more of the backyard area.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the garage entrance, side windows, and the paved path curving around the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with columns, wide main door, and a paved approach with minimal decorative elements.
